chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2047 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 28.08.2025 Mr. Noor Muhammad, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, APG ---------- Counsel for applicant does not wish to press this bail application which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Ashraf
